title: Best Thing
lyrics: [Music] best thing best thing i found turn my world upside yeah spinning me around you got the next thing next local sounding [Outro] And now, yeah, best thing I found, Sunside glow in your reflection, to the noise, but a big sore heart, every doubt lost in direction, every touch got a letter best thing, best thing I've found it could be you, you turned my whole world around around

lyricsSegments.text: best thing best thing i found turn my world upside yeah spinning me around you got the next thing next local sounding
And now, yeah, best thing I found, Sunside glow in your reflection, to the noise, but a big sore heart, every doubt lost in direction, every touch got a letter
best thing, best thing I've found it could be you, you turned my whole world around
